name: Sovereign Cloud Infrastructure
description: European-sovereign cloud infrastructure portfolio covering T Cloud Public, Open Sovereign Cloud, and hyperscaler-sovereign variants — fully EU-operated with BaFin and KRITIS compliance — plus private cloud on VMware Cloud Foundation and hybrid cloud governance for seamless workload placement across sovereignty tiers.
positioning: European-sovereign cloud infrastructure for regulated enterprises — fully EU-operated, BaFin and KRITIS compliant, with private and hybrid deployment options.
